sections.paragraph: f. a column, a pillar, found twice in this connection, תִּימְרֹות־עָשָׁן (other copies תִּֽמְרֹות) pillars of smoke, Son 3:6 Joe 3:3 poet. for the common עַמּוּד עָשָׁן Jud. 20:40 . Root תָּמַר which see. Comp. Talmudic תַּמֵּר to go up like a pillar (used of smoke); תַּמּוּר column, beam (of the rising sun or moon).
